'''鈭歾-l-t-ch''' ('''kazaltechoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:looke|looke]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-l-t-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:looke|looke]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾-l-t-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kazaltechoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizaltechoko|thizaltechoko]] || [[word:jizaltechoko|jizaltechoko]] || [[word:shizaltechoko|shizaltechoko]] || [[word:kizaltechoko|kizaltechoko]]
